canonical_truth.rule: Generated projections are rebuilt from canonical CommonProject files and are never edited as catalogue truth.

selected_design.runtime: The interactive shell consumes one generated build-bound module and does not refetch canonical project files during startup.
selected_design.no_javascript: The generated noscript catalogue remains in index.html.
selected_design.machine_readable: The manifest and every canonical project JSON remain public and independently addressable.
selected_design.privacy: No backend, account, telemetry, cookie or runtime write API is introduced.

redesign_trigger.rule: Architecture review is required after two consecutive representative runs breach any browser budget, or one deterministic static budget is exceeded. Catalogue entry count alone is not a trigger.

does_not_establish: that a backend or runtime API is justified
that one timing sample proves a speedup
permission to weaken no-JavaScript access or privacy
